input.topic: LockBit Global Ransomware-as-a-Service Campaign and Operation Cronos Law Enforcement Disruption
input.notes: LockBit operated as the world's most prolific ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) operation from at least 2020 until Operation Cronos (February 2024), when a coalition of law enforcement agencies seized its infrastructure. The campaign article should cover LockBit's affiliate model, key variants (LockBit 2.0, LockBit 3.0/Black), documented sector targeting, and the international disruption operation. Draft conservatively from CISA advisory AA23-075A, DOJ press releases, Europol, and NCA. Do not speculate on total victim counts or financial impact beyond confirmed law enforcement statements. Keep attribution to the LockBit group per DOJ/NCA sources.
